# minio_batch_jobs (Data Source)

Lists active MinIO batch jobs, optionally filtered by job type and status.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "minio_batch_jobs" "all" {}

data "minio_batch_jobs" "expire" {
  job_type = "expire"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `job_type` (String) Filter by batch job type (replicate, expire, keyrotate).
- `status` (String) Filter by job status (started, completed, failed). In-process filtering when the API does not support it.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `jobs` (List of Object) List of matching batch jobs. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--jobs))

<a id="nestedatt--jobs"></a>
### Nested Schema for `jobs`

Read-Only:

- `elapsed` (String)
- `job_id` (String)
- `job_type` (String)
- `started` (String)
- `status` (String)
- `user` (String)
